steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content: The blank separates two independent clauses: the first ends with “supervised machine [learning]” and has a complete verb (works), the second begins with “Supervised machine learning” and has its own complete verb (involves).

steps.title: Apply the sentence boundary rule
steps.content: Two independent clauses cannot be separated by a comma alone—that creates a comma splice. Choice C correctly uses a period (learning. Supervised). Choice B creates a comma splice, while A and D produce ungrammatical structures. That matches choice C — C is correct.
